title: DLR B90
description: Adds a B90 for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod.
body:
Addon for the [Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) mod:
You must use this mod for the contents of this pack to function, it should
appear on the train sidings once the pack is loaded.
- This addon was originally published on the MTR mod Discord server.

### From V7 onwards, the pack only supports MTR 4.0+.

### The latest MTR3 version here is 6.4. Please pay attention when downloading since the versions weren't uploaded in the right order.

> _So yeah. That's the pack I am the most known for...
> I initially had the plan to make an actual 26m long B90. However, the model was so messy due to me having no prior experience that I had to scrap it up. Then, SirPiglin asked me if I can edit a LHI T851(Made by Navi, AdoraLi and MeiFwong) to have 9m long cars so that he can retexture it to make it look like a B90. I then have brought several changes, first on the texture, then to the model to finally look closer to an actual B90._

Let me introduce you the pack if you are really unfamiliar with, this pack basically adds a B90 from the Docklands Light Railway. Only two variants are available as of ver 6.4.
-Only the black front is done,
- A longitudinal(it actually existed irl lol):
![Longitudinal interior](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4f223ecc00e609cd17f6d7bc379abf167030a2c.png)
- A more regular transverse version is available:
![A transverse interior](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ff79f654ff1e0575acdca61af334bff0e80d4a6.png)

**-This pack is supported by all the versions the MTRmod already supports, ranging from 1.16.5 to 1.20.x currently.**


**Extensions for this pack on that site:**

[Curt's sound enhancement](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/b90enhance)

[B07 by Lt. Serg](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minecraft-transit-railway-dlr-b07-stock)

### Disclaimer:
You may find the detailed changelog in the Discord release posts.

You may refer to the latest version of the pack for credits. Older versions are left as they were and some may contain mistakes/confusions.

Here are the credits from v6.4:
- [NaviLX9702](https://modrinth.com/user/LX9702), AdoraLi and MeiFwong for the original train,
- [NaviLX9702](https://modrinth.com/user/LX9702) for the door sounds, part of the texture elements and help,
- SirPiglin for the majority of the texturing and properties editing,

### Terms of use

Unmodified refers to any non-explicit modification of the files, meaning you have only combined the assets from 2 versions of the same pack without even touching the .json (as an example).

-Please do not put a paywall under any unmodified copy of the pack that you redistribute.

-Remember to credit both of us when redistributing the punmodified ack to another site.

**UPDATE:**

-Any redistribution(even of modified assets) on any other site should not refrain me or SirPiglin from distributing the original version of the pack by ourselves, this includes setting the license to ARR on Modrinth(see below).

-When redistributing on Modrinth any asset I have created, even if I published these outside of this site, please do not set the license to ARR as you are refraining other people from posting their own variants.
